openFindings.title: Authoritative phase tree is not reproducible from its generator
openFindings.description: The checked-in authoritative phase tree cannot be regenerated from its declared source.
openFindings.scopeProof: Direct generator replay plus manifest, parent, and graph comparison.

openFindings.title: Root execution contract retains superseded phase identities
openFindings.description: Operational parent prose points executors at superseded phases.
openFindings.scopeProof: Exact stale-number sweep compared with root map and graph metadata.

openFindings.title: Rename apply is not bound to the reviewed repository and map snapshot
openFindings.description: Explicit apply may execute a reviewed rename plan against changed repository or map state.
openFindings.scopeProof: Engine spec/decision/checklist and harness searched for stale-plan, snapshot, HEAD, cleanliness, and revalidation contracts; the reference executor's blob CAS does not cover git mv.

openFindings.title: Declared leading-hyphen hazard lacks an executable rejection criterion
openFindings.description: The plan names an option-like path hazard without a testable engine behavior.
openFindings.scopeProof: Policy-to-engine-to-harness exact search for leading-hyphen, argv, option termination, and option-like operands.

openFindings.title: Execution identity is split across packet 020, legacy 032, and branch slug 017
openFindings.description: The first executable phase cannot determine one canonical packet/worktree identity.
openFindings.scopeProof: Exact packet-number and worktree-grammar sweep across root, phase 000, phase 001, and child titles.

openFindings.title: Most spec nodes point their HVR marker at a nonexistent path
openFindings.description: 116 packet Markdown files reference .opencode/skills/sk-doc/references/hvr_rules.md, which does not exist; the live rule file is under sk-doc/shared/references and 17 packet files already use that path.
openFindings.scopeProof: Corpus count excluding review artifacts plus filesystem existence check.

ruledOut: filesystem node absent from manifest beyond F001
